name: Configure OIDC App
description: Application-specific OIDC configuration before container start. For apps that need config files modified (e.g. Node-RED settings.js). The default shared script is a no-op. Applications override conf-configure-oidc-app.sh in their own scripts/ directory.

parameters.name: Shared Volume Path
parameters.description: Path to the shared volume mount point

parameters.name: OIDC Issuer URL
parameters.description: Zitadel issuer URL (available from reconfigure, not first install)

parameters.name: OIDC Client ID
parameters.description: OIDC client ID (available from reconfigure, not first install)

parameters.name: OIDC Client Secret
parameters.description: OIDC client secret (available from reconfigure, not first install)
